{{Infobox artifact
| name = Yerin's sword
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] carries a white-bladed [[sword]] and a silver blade on her back.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[sword]] on [[Yerin]]'s hip has a power that is distant and cold.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] has a [[sword]] that she uses for cycling.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
